finalAssistantMessages.text: I’m doing a final cross-check for “hidden” source surfaces that might make an OK module less OK: model names, public method names, and API routes that are not represented in the short inventory rows.
The source and docs stayed untouched (`git status --short` is clean in `geesome-node`). I’ve got enough evidence now; I’m consolidating into the requested concise per-module report.

Read-only review complete; I did not edit files and `geesome-node` stayed clean. - `database`: OK. No meaningful mismatch found. Suggested replacement: none. - `group`: OK. Covers the real ownership: groups/posts, memberships, friends/personal chats, reads, tags/mentions/autotags, post events, counters, manifests, and large-list helpers. Suggested replacement: none. - `content`: OK. Covers uploads/imports, previewing, serving, restore, tombstones/purge, public metadata, and storage-object sync. Suggested replacement: none. - `storage`: OK. The docs match the low-level backend wrapper role. Suggested replacement: none. - `storageSpace`: OK. The docs match analysis queries, snapshots, availabi
